name: Garlic Fiddleheads
recipeInstructions:
1. Steam fiddleheads in petal steamer for 10 - 15 minutes.
2. Heat butter over low heat.
3. Sauté garlic gently until fragrant.
4. Add fiddleheads to the pan and continue sautéing.
5. Squeeze the juice of one lemon into the pan.
6. Gently mix everything together, adding salt and pepper to taste.
Note: Do not rush the cooking process; allow flavors to develop slowly.
